title: Cohnia flabelliformis
taxonomy: Cohnia flabelliformis is classified within the family Orchidaceae, which is the largest and most diverse family of flowering plants. This orchid is native to Mexico. Its classification can also be broken down further into the subfamily Epidendroideae and the tribe Epidendreae. Cohnia flabelliformis belongs to the genus Cohnia, which is a small and rare genus of orchids. The exact classification of Cohnia flabelliformis is still subject to ongoing research and verification.
